productDisplayName: Femella Women Black Striped Tank Dress
description: Style Note Strikingly chic, this woven dress from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Offering a flowy silhouette, you can pair this colour block piece with pumps. Product DetailsBlack striped printed sleeveless dress, has a round neck and tiny tucks at the waist Material and Care Blended fabric Cold wash with like colours Do not iron, bleach or wring Dry inside out Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 85 cm from shoulder to the hem
